product_overview: CloudOptima is a B2B SaaS dashboard for cloud architecture, DevOps, and FinOps teams to securely connect AWS accounts, analyze infrastructure usage, and identify waste with actionable remediation guidance. It focuses on least-privilege access, encrypted credential handling, and live cost/resource insights.
core_goals: Securely authenticate users and isolate each tenant's AWS configuration
Validate and store AWS credentials safely using encryption
Provide live AWS resource and cost visibility for dashboard reporting
Detect idle, orphaned, and wasteful resources using heuristics
Enable optimization actions on flagged cloud resources
Surface historical cost trends and summary savings metrics

features.name: Health Check API
features.description: Verifies that the backend service is running and reachable.
user_flows: GET /health with no authentication -> Receive 200 response confirming service health
GET /health when the service is unavailable -> Receive non-200 error or no response, indicating the API is unhealthy

features.name: Settings Management API
features.description: Allows authenticated users to save AWS configuration securely with encryption for later dashboard analysis.
user_flows: POST /api/settings/aws with valid JWT and body {accessKeyId, secretAccessKey, region} -> Receive 200 response confirming encrypted settings saved
POST /api/settings/aws without authentication -> Receive 401 unauthorized response
POST /api/settings/aws with malformed or missing AWS fields -> Receive 400 validation error response
POST /api/settings/aws with authenticated request but server-side encryption/storage failure -> Receive 500 error response

features.name: AWS Validation API
features.description: Validates AWS credentials using STS before they are accepted for dashboard use.
user_flows: POST /api/validate-aws with valid accessKeyId and secretAccessKey -> Receive 200 response confirming AWS identity validation succeeded
POST /api/validate-aws with invalid or expired credentials -> Receive 400 error response indicating validation failed
POST /api/validate-aws with missing credential fields -> Receive 400 validation error response

features.name: Dashboard Data API
features.description: Fetches live AWS dashboard data, including active resources and cost information, using provided AWS credentials.
user_flows: POST /api/get-dashboard-data with valid accessKeyId, secretAccessKey, and region -> Receive 200 response with active resource and cost payload
POST /api/get-dashboard-data with invalid AWS credentials -> Receive 400 response indicating AWS lookup or validation failure
POST /api/get-dashboard-data with AWS service or scanning failure -> Receive 500 server error response

features.name: Dashboard Summary API
features.description: Returns aggregated cost metrics and recommendation counts for the dashboard summary view.
user_flows: GET /api/dashboard/summary with valid authentication token -> Receive 200 response with summary metrics and recommendation counts
GET /api/dashboard/summary without authentication -> Receive 401 unauthorized response
GET /api/dashboard/summary when summary aggregation fails -> Receive 500 server error response

features.name: Resource Scanner API
features.description: Runs a full scan of AWS resources and computes optimization recommendations for EC2, S3, EBS, and Elastic IPs.
user_flows: GET /api/resources/scanner with valid authentication token -> Receive 200 response with scan results and optimization recommendations
GET /api/resources/scanner without authentication -> Receive 401 unauthorized response
GET /api/resources/scanner when AWS scanning or rules engine fails -> Receive 500 server error response

features.name: Resource History API
features.description: Retrieves historical cost trend records for reporting and analysis.
user_flows: GET /api/resources/history with valid authentication token -> Receive 200 response with historical trend data
GET /api/resources/history without authentication -> Receive 401 unauthorized response
GET /api/resources/history when the database query fails -> Receive 500 server error response

features.name: Optimize Resource API
features.description: Applies an optimization action to a specific flagged resource by resource ID.
user_flows: POST /api/resources/optimize/:id with valid authentication token and body {action} -> Receive 200 response confirming the action was applied
POST /api/resources/optimize/:id with a resource ID that does not exist -> Receive 404 not found response
POST /api/resources/optimize/:id without authentication -> Receive 401 unauthorized response
POST /api/resources/optimize/:id when optimization execution fails -> Receive 500 server error response

features.name: Health Check API
features.description: Simple health verification of the running API server

features.name: Settings Management API
features.description: CRUD/save AWS configurations securely with encryption

features.name: AWS Validation API
features.description: Validate AWS credentials directly via STS client

features.name: Dashboard Data API
features.description: Retrieve live active resources, costs, and details from AWS SDK

features.name: Dashboard Summary API
features.description: Aggregated cost stats and savings metrics
